curation_notes: Re-curated with updated guidelines. The vulnerability is in actix-codec's Framed struct which had a blanket `impl Unpin for Framed<T, U>` that was unsound. Combined with unsafe `Pin::new_unchecked` calls in next_item, flush, and close, this allowed use-after-free when the inner I/O type relied on pin stability. The patch replaced the blanket Unpin impl and unsafe pin projections with the safe pin_project macro. 6 non-config source files were changed (noisy) but the actual vulnerability is localized to actix-codec/src/framed.rs; the other changes in actix-ioframe, actix-utils, and actix-rt are cascading API adaptations. L3 hints were updated to be more specific than L1/L2: area narrows to the codec crate's framing layer, and description adds context about the blanket trait implementation.
